name: asset-browser
description: Reusable asset browser with manifest, prompts, upload/review workflow — deploys to Vercel.

scripts.test: node --test api/_handler.test.js api/_ratelimit.test.js api/_modules.test.js api/_health.test.js api/_headers.test.js api/a11y.test.js api/_i18n.test.js api/_pwa.test.js api/_logger.test.js api/_perf-budget.test.js api/_upload-multi.test.js api/_bulk-tags.test.js api/_sprite-preview.test.js api/_bulk-tags.functional.test.js api/_backup.test.js api/_restore.test.js api/_audit.test.js api/_trash-retention.test.js
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run validate && npm run smoke && npm run perf
scripts.dev: npm run build && npx serve public -l 5174
